analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet condemns the immediate leaking of confidential IAEA reports on Iran to the US press as "shameful," while highlighting that the reports confirm good cooperation between Iran and the Agency. Evaluation per narrative: RU1 (The West and their allies are immoral, hostile and decadent) — The tweet implies misconduct linked to the US press and suggests an unethical pattern (leaks upon circulation among Governors), framing this as shameful. While it does not attack the entire West comprehensively, it clearly casts the US/Western information ecosystem as behaving improperly toward Iran. This aligns with RU1’s depiction of Western immorality/hostility. RU2 — No claim that Russia leads or promotes an alternative system. RU3 — No portrayal of Russia as a benevolent partner. RU4 — No historical admiration content. RU5 — No current Russian success content. RU6 — No cultural/nature content. Conclusion: The tweet promotes RU1 only.
